# synthetics_create_totp_variable_v2 (Resource)

Manages a Synthetics TOTP variable. The TOTP secret is stored in Terraform state even when marked sensitive. Use encrypted, access-controlled remote state and do not commit state files or real TOTP seeds.

## Example Usage

```terraform
variable "login_mfa_totp_secret" {
  type      = string
  sensitive = true
}

resource "synthetics_create_totp_variable_v2" "login_mfa" {
  totp_variable {
    name        = "login_mfa"
    description = "TOTP seed for login browser test"
    secret      = var.login_mfa_totp_secret
    digits      = 6
    interval    = 30
    hmac_digest = "sha1"
  }
}
```

TOTP `secret` values are stored in Terraform state. `Sensitive` suppresses normal CLI display but does not encrypt or remove the value from state. Use encrypted, access-controlled remote state and do not commit `.tfstate`, secret variable files, or real TOTP seeds.

The TOTP data sources expose metadata only. They do not return `secret`, and imported TOTP resources cannot recover the original secret from the API.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `totp_variable` (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--totp_variable))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--totp_variable"></a>
### Nested Schema for `totp_variable`

Required:

- `name` (String)
- `secret` (String, Sensitive)

Optional:

- `description` (String)
- `digits` (Number)
- `hmac_digest` (String)
- `interval` (Number)

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String)
- `created_by` (String)
- `id` (Number)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `updated_by` (String)
